body.processed:
You can search and order materials (books, games, music, articles, movies) from Denmark's public libraries and research libraries.

When you order a material, we deliver it to you as early as possible, so you can pick it up at your own library.

So if you order a book which is not available at your own library, we - and the infrastructure - do what we can to find the book as quick as possible and send it to your library.
body.value:
You can search and order materials (books, games, music, articles, movies) from Denmark's public libraries and research libraries.

When you order a material, we deliver it to you as early as possible, so you can pick it up at your own library.

So if you order a book which is not available at your own library, we - and the infrastructure - do what we can to find the book as quick as possible and send it to your library.

38.title: What can I do at Bibliotek.dk?

body.processed:
In order to log in, you need a CPR-number and a pincode. If you have forgotten your pincode, please contact your local library to get a new one. In most libraries you can make the pincode online:

  • Go to your library's website
  • Log in with MitId
  • Now you can make a new pincode in your account
body.value:
In order to log in, you need a CPR-number and a pincode. If you have forgotten your pincode, please contact your local library to get a new one. In most libraries you can make the pincode online:

  • Go to your library's website
  • Log in with MitId
  • Now you can make a new pincode in your account

49.title: How do I get a new pincode?

body.processed:
NOTA is the Danish Library and Expertise Center for people with print disabilities.

To become a member of NOTA you must be able to document that you cannot read ordinary printed text. Members of NOTA are visually impaired, dyslexic or otherwise impaired. See more about NOTA

52.title: How do I find online audiobooks?

body.processed: You may find that a language is missing in the drop-down boxes in the advanced search. Use the feedback button on the page to let us know which language you are missing - then we will add it as soon as we can. There is a solution on the way, so that we soon will be able to show all languages.
